'''nadoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacylbrownioside|deacylbrownioside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacylbrownioside|deacylbrownioside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nadoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædereth|nædereth]] || [[word:næderej|næderej]] || [[word:næderesh|næderesh]] || [[word:nædere|nædere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadodoroth|nadodoroth]] || [[word:nadodoroj|nadodoroj]] || [[word:nadodorosh|nadodorosh]] || [[word:nadodoro|nadodoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadoroth|nadoroth]] || [[word:nadoroj|nadoroj]] || [[word:nadorosh|nadorosh]] || [[word:nadoro|nadoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadofroth|nadofroth]] || [[word:nadofroj|nadofroj]] || [[word:nadofrosh|nadofrosh]] || [[word:nadofrof|nadofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadorotho|nadorotho]] || [[word:nadorojo|nadorojo]] || [[word:nadorosho|nadorosho]] || [[word:nadoroko|nadoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadoroth|nadoroth]] || [[word:nadoroj|nadoroj]] || [[word:nadorosh|nadorosh]] || [[word:nadoro|nadoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadorothol|nadorothol]] || [[word:nadorojol|nadorojol]] || [[word:nadoroshol|nadoroshol]] || [[word:nadorokol|nadorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadorothotho|nadorothotho]] || [[word:nadorojojo|nadorojojo]] || [[word:nadoroshosho|nadoroshosho]] || [[word:nadoroko|nadoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadorothon|nadorothon]] || [[word:nadorojon|nadorojon]] || [[word:nadoroshon|nadoroshon]] || [[word:nadorokon|nadorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadorothoro|nadorothoro]] || [[word:nadorojoro|nadorojoro]] || [[word:nadoroshoro|nadoroshoro]] || [[word:nadorokoro|nadorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
